impact_analysis.target_function: test_three_gate_e2e fixture dict (MT-1), test_three_gate_pipeline nosec B105/B106 (MT-2), .bandit 원복 (MT-2), tests/test_pm_split.py nosec B105 (MT-2), TestPrGateActualModel class (MT-3)
